overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through the colorful Mediterranean-style city of Toussaint. The character ascends stone stairs, traverses a bustling market, passes through a decorated archway, and explores a sunlit central plaza with a fountain.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow cobblestone alley with stone stairs

events.description: character begins ascending the stone staircase

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily through the narrow alley and climbing the stone stairs

entered.detail: tall weathered stone walls lining the narrow passage
dark wooden door with metal studs set in the stone wall
wide stone staircase leading upward between the buildings
green shrubs in terracotta pots along the left wall
decorative stone balustrades lining the upper terrace

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow cobblestone alley with tall stone walls. Geralt walks forward toward a wide stone staircase, passing potted plants and a wooden door. As he ascends the stairs, decorative stone railings become visible at the top.

events.description: exits the narrow alley onto an open terrace with flower bushes

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking along the upper terrace, approaching the market area ahead

entered.detail: open stone-paved terrace area at the top of the stairs
large green bushes with red flowers in stone planters
colorful market tents and stalls visible in the distance
strings of triangular flags hanging across the street ahead

segments.scene_description: Geralt emerges onto an elevated stone terrace with decorative railings and flower bushes. The narrow alley walls fall behind as the space opens up, revealing colorful market stalls and festive banners strung across the cobblestone street ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: open-air market with vendor stalls and colorful banners

events.description: enters the bustling market area with vendor stalls on both sides

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking through the market crowd, passing vendors and shoppers

notable_agents.action: woman in white dress walking ahead through the market
market vendor standing behind a stall with red canopy

entered.detail: wooden market stalls with red fabric canopies selling goods
bright red cloth awnings over the vendor stalls
overhead strings of multicolored triangular pennant flags
tall pink stucco building with white trim visible at the end of the street

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a lively market street with red-canopied vendor stalls on both sides and colorful bunting overhead. Geralt navigates through moderate crowds of pedestrians, including a woman in white ahead, while the distinctive pink building of Toussaint looms in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered stone archway with painted murals

events.description: enters the covered stone archway leaving the market
lighting shifts to shadow as character moves under the covered passage

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking through the shadowed archway passage toward the bright exit

entered.detail: large covered stone passage with high ceilings connecting two buildings
faded painted murals and frescoes on the blue interior walls

segments.scene_description: Geralt leaves the market and enters a covered stone archway with blue painted walls featuring old murals. The lighting shifts to shadow as he passes through the enclosed corridor, with the bright exit and the pink building visible at the far end.

scene_state.functional_zone: central plaza with circular fountain and colorful townhouses

events.description: exits the archway into the bright open plaza with a central fountain

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking around the plaza, passing the central fountain and observing the surroundings

notable_agents.action: man in blue and yellow clothing walking across the plaza

entered.detail: large circular stone fountain with flower beds around the base
wide open cobblestone square surrounded by colorful buildings
tall stone column with decorative top near the fountain
ornate historic buildings in pink, yellow, and blue facades

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the archway, the scene opens into a sunlit central plaza featuring a large circular fountain surrounded by flower beds. Colorful townhouses in pink, yellow, and blue line the square, and a stone column monument stands near the fountain as Geralt walks past scattered pedestrians.

events.description: leaves the open plaza and enters a narrower cobblestone street

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking down the narrow street away from the plaza

entered.detail: winding narrow street with cobblestones between tall stone buildings
stone archway bridge connecting buildings overhead
red flowers growing on vines along the left wall

segments.scene_description: Geralt leaves the plaza and enters a narrower cobblestone street lined with historic stone facades and red flowering vines. A stone archway bridge spans the street ahead as the open plaza and fountain fall behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a secluded cobblestone alleyway into the vibrant, sun-drenched heart of a Mediterranean city. It begins by following Geralt through a narrow passage of tall stone walls and potted plants, ascending a wide staircase that leads toward an elevated terrace. As the space opens up, the camera moves past decorative railings and flower bushes into a lively market street filled with red-canopied stalls, festive bunting, and bustling crowds. The scene then shifts into the cool shadow of a covered stone archway adorned with blue murals before emerging once more into the brilliant light of a central plaza featuring a large circular fountain and colorful townhouses. Finally, the camera leaves the open square behind, gliding into a narrower street lined with historic facades and red flowering vines that lead toward a spanning stone bridge.
